text:
Starbridge AI | Senior Backend Engineer | NYC or Remote | Full-time

We're building an AI platform that turns large-scale public and enterprise data into reliable sales insights. Early stage, moving fast, zero to one.

Stack: Kotlin, Java, React, TypeScript. 3+ years of experience required. $130k - $160k.

Apply: https://starbridge.ai/careers or email recruiting@starbridge.ai
